abilities.name: swarm
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its Bug-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is increased.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: shed-skin
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.effect: After each turn, this Pokémon has a 33% of being cured of any major status ailment.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon may cure its own status conditions by shedding its skin.

abilities.name: no-guard
abilities.shortEffect: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.
abilities.effect: Moves used by or against this Pokémon never miss. One-hit KO moves are unaffected. Moves affected by this ability can hit Pokémon during the preparation turn of moves like Dig or Fly. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon employs no-guard tactics to ensure incoming and outgoing attacks always land.
